creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
FreeSWITCH is a scalable open source cross-platform telephony platform designed to route and interconnect popular communication protocols using audio, video, text or any other form of media.

The FreeSWITCH team strongly recommends installing from the latest Git tree/snapshot which is extremely stable!

Shar > 400k and attached below.

Fix: 

cd /usr/ports/net
sh freeswitch-snapshot-shar.txt
cd freeswitch-snapshot && make install
